\smallskip
{\footnotesize\raggedright $^{\dagger}$ A \emph{user-initiated step} is a step whose first input event is a user message. This need not equal the number of user messages: (i)~a message the user sends while the agent is still working is delivered together with the next tool result, so that step is counted as tool-initiated; and (ii)~a message that never triggers another model call is not counted as a step at all.\par}
